- AC1: PAID → "completed" ✓
- AC2: REFUNDED → "refunded" ✓
- AC3: FAILED/DECLINED → "failed" ✓
- AC4: unknown status → "unknown" + logger.warn ✓
- AC5: cents → dollars with 2dp ✓

PASS .tmp/normalizeOrderEvent.test.ts
  AC1: status PAID
    ✓ maps "PAID" to "completed"
  AC2: status REFUNDED

  AC3: status FAILED or DECLINED

    ✓ maps "DECLINED" to "failed" (1 ms)
  AC4: unknown status
    ✓ maps "PROCESSING" to "unknown" (1 ms)
    ✓ maps an empty-string status to "unknown" and warns

    ✓ does NOT warn for known statuses
  AC5: cents-to-dollars conversion
    ✓ converts 1000 cents to 10.00 dollars
    ✓ converts 199 cents to 1.99 dollars (1 ms)
    ✓ converts 0 cents to 0.00 dollars
    ✓ rounds to 2 decimal places (150 cents → 1.50)
    ✓ preserves the order id in the output
  AC6: missing or null customer_name
    ✓ uses "Anonymous" when customer_name is undefined
    ✓ uses "Anonymous" when customer_name is null
    ✓ preserves a provided customer_name
